mapper.select: select id, publisher_id, title, cover_url, content, location, venue_id, signup_limit, current_signup_count, wait_limit, status, audit_status, audit_remark, signup_start_time, signup_end_time, activity_start_time, activity_end_time from activity where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into activity_signup ( activity_id, user_id, signup_time, signup_status, sign_status, wait_order ) values ( #{activityId}, #{userId}, #{signupTime}, #{signupStatus}, #{signStatus}, #{waitOrder} )
mapper.select: select id, activity_id, user_id, signup_time, signup_status, sign_status, sign_time, cancel_time, wait_order, create_time, update_time from activity_signup where id = #{id} limit 1

select id, activity_id, user_id, signup_time, signup_status, sign_status, sign_time, cancel_time, wait_order, create_time, update_time from activity_signup where activity_id = #{activityId} and user_id = #{userId} order by id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update activity_signup set signup_status = 2, cancel_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and signup_status = 1
update activity set current_signup_count = current_signup_count + 1 where id = #{activityId} and current_signup_count < signup_limit
update activity set current_signup_count = current_signup_count - 1 where id = #{activityId} and current_signup_count > 0
mapper.select: select id, publisher_id, title, cover_url, content, location, venue_id, signup_start_time, signup_end_time, activity_start_time, activity_end_time, signup_limit, current_signup_count, wait_limit, status, audit_status, audit_remark, audit_user_id, audit_time, is_deleted, create_time, update_time from activity where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.update: update activity_signup set sign_status = 1, sign_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and signup_status = 1 and sign_status = 0
mapper.insert: insert into activity ( publisher_id, title, cover_url, content, location, venue_id, signup_start_time, signup_end_time, activity_start_time, activity_end_time, signup_limit, current_signup_count, wait_limit, status, audit_status, is_deleted ) values ( #{publisherId}, #{title}, #{coverUrl}, #{content}, #{location}, #{venueId}, #{signupStartTime}, #{signupEndTime}, #{activityStartTime}, #{activityEndTime}, #{signupLimit}, #{currentSignupCount}, #{waitLimit}, #{status}, #{auditStatus}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.update: update activity set publisher_id = #{publisherId}, title = #{title}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, content = #{content}, location = #{location}, venue_id = #{venueId}, signup_start_time = #{signupStartTime}, signup_end_time = #{signupEndTime}, activity_start_time = #{activityStartTime}, activity_end_time = #{activityEndTime}, signup_limit = #{signupLimit}, wait_limit = #{waitLimit}, status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update activity set audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{activityId} and is_deleted = 0
update activity set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{activityId} and is_deleted = 0
